children.name: ParseInput
children.purpose: Extract and validate action, repo, branch from input JSON
children.behavior: Parse JSON input, validate required fields, return structured action request
postconditions: Action request is well-formed or error returned
guarantees: Returns error if fields missing or invalid

outputs.name: action_request
outputs.description: Parsed and validated action, repo, branch

constraints.description: action field must be one of: trigger, status, list, cancel
repo and branch fields required for trigger action
build_id required for status and cancel actions

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns action_request dict with action, repo, branch keys on valid input
Returns error dict on invalid JSON or missing required fields

children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Create a new build for given repo+branch if no active build exists
children.behavior: Check builds store for existing active build, create new build entry with unique ID, initialize logs
postconditions: New build created with initial status 'running'

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check for existing active build and create new build entry

outputs.name: build_result
outputs.description: Success status and build_id or error

children.signature: def TriggerBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> dict

global_vars.description: Check for duplicate active builds and create new build entry

data_operations.description: Check for existing active build and create new build entry

constraints.description: Must not create duplicate active builds for same repo+branch
Build ID must be unique across all builds

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns error if active build already exists for repo+branch

children.name: CheckBuildStatus
children.purpose: Retrieve current status and logs of a specific build
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id in builds store, return status and logs
guarantees: Returns error if build not found

global_vars.description: Retrieve build status and logs by build_id

data_operations.description: Retrieve build status and logs by build_id

constraints.description: build_id must reference an existing build

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns status and logs for valid build_id

children.name: ListBuilds
children.purpose: Return a list of all builds, optionally filtered by repo or branch
children.behavior: Query builds store, apply optional filters, return list of build summaries
guarantees: Returns all builds if no filters

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Query all builds and apply filters

children.signature: def ListBuilds(repo: Optional[str] = None, branch: Optional[str] = None) -> list

global_vars.description: Query all builds and apply optional filters

data_operations.description: Query all builds and apply optional filters

constraints.description: Filters are optional; no filters returns all builds

acceptance_criteria.description: Filters correctly narrow results by repo and/or branch

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Mark a running build as cancelled
children.behavior: Find build by build_id, update status to 'cancelled' if currently running
guarantees: Does not cancel already finished builds

call_inputs.name: build_id
call_inputs.description: Identifier of the build to cancel

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Find build and update its status

global_vars.description: Find build by build_id and update its status to cancelled

data_operations.description: Find build by build_id and update its status to cancelled

constraints.description: Only running builds can be cancelled
build_id must reference an existing build

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns success for valid running build
Returns error for non-existent or already finished build

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Construct final JSON output from child results
children.behavior: Aggregate success, build_id, status, logs from child outputs into unified JSON

call_inputs.name: child_result
call_inputs.description: Result from the executed child action

constraints.description: Error responses must include 'error' key with message

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns JSON with success, build_id, status, logs for successful operations
Returns JSON with success: false and error message for failed operations

governance_notes: All children preserve Stage 1 semantics and Stage 2 interfaces exactly. Resource fields derived from internal_leaf_accesses: TriggerBuild, CancelBuild use builds.read_write; CheckBuildStatus, ListBuilds use builds.read; ParseInput and FormatResponse have no data store access. global_vars and data_operations are synchronized for all children. No artifacts store is accessed by any child in this decomposition.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All six signatures are copied verbatim from Stage 2 without any modification.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: TriggerBuild.internal_leaf_accesses[builds.read_write] maps to global_vars[builds.read_write] and data_operations[builds.read_write]. CheckBuildStatus.internal_leaf_accesses[builds.read] maps to global_vars[builds.read] and data_operations[builds.read]. ListBuilds.internal_leaf_accesses[builds.read] maps to global_vars[builds.read] and data_operations[builds.read]. CancelBuild.internal_leaf_accesses[builds.read_write] maps to global_vars[builds.read_write] and data_operations[builds.read_write]. ParseInput and FormatResponse have no internal_leaf_accesses, so global_vars and data_operations are empty.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: For each child, global_vars and data_operations contain identical entries in terms of variable/resource name, operation type, and description. This ensures perfect synchronization between the two fields.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources referenced in internal_leaf_accesses (builds) are covered in global_vars and data_operations. The artifacts store is not accessed by any child, which is consistent with the given interfaces. No resource is referenced in global_vars/data_operations without being in internal_leaf_accesses.
